title: Smoky Red Curry Salad
description: A vibrant and flavorful salad that combines the tangy, smoky, and spicy notes of red curry with crisp vegetables for a meal-prep-friendly Venezuelan dish.
instructions: Prepare the red curry paste by mixing it with rice vinegar and jalapeno in a blender until smooth.
Heat up a pan over medium heat. Add the prepared curry paste mixture to the pan and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the tomato, green bell pepper, and red onion into the hot sauce and stir to coat well. Cook for another 5-7 minutes until slightly softened.
Remove from heat and let it cool down. Add cilantro leaves just before serving.
Serve chilled as a side dish or salad.
